prompt: Crie um fluxo de onboarding de 3 steps para um app mobile web, glassmorphism

assertions.name: generates-design-tokens-first
assertions.description: Generates design tokens with glassmorphism properties BEFORE writing HTML

assertions.name: glassmorphism-tokens
assertions.description: Design tokens include backdrop-filter, glass-bg, glass-border

assertions.name: mobile-first-9-16
assertions.description: Layout is mobile-first, optimized for 9:16 viewport

assertions.name: step-navigation
assertions.description: Has next/back navigation and step indicator

note: Run Skill Creator eval cycle to score assertions
